title: geranium robertianum subvar. modestum
intro: Geranium robertianum subvar. modestum, also known as the small-flowered crane's-bill or modest geranium, is a subvariety of the geranium robertianum plant, which is a type of flowering plant belonging to the geranium family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive problems, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The herbal preparations of Geranium robertianum subvar. modestum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical applications, such as creams and ointments, or consumed internally as a medicinal remedy.
